title: Surgeon Vacancy at Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited:
Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
